title: “These Are Parts Of an Alien UFO!” -Stanford Scientist Garry Nolan
summary: Dr. Gary Nolan, a Stanford microbiologist, discusses his involvement with CIA research on people who claimed UFO contact, examining neurological differences in their brains. He also reveals his work analyzing alleged UFO crash materials with anomalous isotope ratios, including samples from Uba Tuba, Brazil and potentially Roswell.

acronyms.definition: The main UFO program out of the DoD over the last 15 years with a $22 million budget
One of the biggest institutes in the country for distributing research funding
Brain imaging technology used to examine neurological structures

events.description: Trinity UFO crash where a larger bismuth piece allegedly came from
Roswell crash, described as a dividing line after which people started seeing aliens instead of angels, demons, or fairies
Nimitz UFO sighting witnessed by Commander David Fravor

key_claims.claim: The CIA came to Gary Nolan's office at Stanford to ask for help analyzing people who claimed UFO contact
People who had UFO encounters showed differences in the caudate nucleus and putamen area of the brain with increased neural density
The brain structure differences found in UFO experiencers also appeared in their family members, suggesting a genetic component
Magnesium samples from Uba Tuba, Brazil had isotope ratios that would never be found in nature
The bismuth-magnesium layered material can reduce microwave guide size for terahertz frequencies to about 1/30th of the wavelength
The bismuth sample was sent anonymously by someone claiming to be an army officer who found it in his grandfather's archives with a diary entry saying it was from Roswell
ATIP had only a $22 million budget compared to fighter jet budgets exceeding $100 billion
Jacques Vallee publishes his address online so people who witness UFO crashes can send him parts
